name: provider_note_vitals_companion
description: Provider companion app scoped to the current note: mobile-friendly vitals entry form that originates a Vitals command on submit.

applications.name: Enter Vitals
applications.description: Capture vitals on a mobile device and originate a Vitals command on the current note.

handlers.description: Serves the vitals entry UI and the POST endpoint that originates the Vitals command.
